project_info.name: AAYNA
project_info.design_feeling: Modern, feminine, warm, premium, clean, social-media-friendly, not childish, not overly pink, not luxury-expensive.

theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with soft premium retail styling
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Client explicitly requested warm, modern feminine feel with a specific dusty rose and cream palette. Adapting E1 Organic Archetype to fit this exact spec.

usage_rules.buttons: Dusty Rose (#9A4F5F) background with white text.
usage_rules.discount_badges: Antique Gold (#C6A15B) background with Espresso Charcoal (#2F2623) text.
usage_rules.accent_restriction: Antique Gold must only be used for small accents (badges, stars, thin borders), NEVER large backgrounds.

rules.buttons_and_ui: Inter, font-weight 600. NEVER use Playfair Display for buttons.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, premium retail spacing. Generous whitespace around product images.

mobile_specifics.tap_targets: Minimum 44px height for all interactive elements.
mobile_specifics.checkout: Strictly single-column stacked layout on mobile.
mobile_specifics.sticky_cart: Fixed/sticky bottom 'Add to Cart' button on product detail pages.

grid_patterns.product_listing: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-[#9A4F5F] text-[#FFFFFF] font-semibold font-['Inter'] rounded-none hover:bg-[#834351] transition-colors h-11 px-6 flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: border border-[#9A4F5F] text-[#9A4F5F] font-semibold font-['Inter'] rounded-none hover:bg-[#F7E7E9] transition-colors h-11 px-6 flex items-center justify-center

product_cards.container: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#EADDD4] flex flex-col group overflow-hidden
product_cards.image: w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500
product_cards.content: p-3 md:p-4 flex flex-col gap-1 md:gap-2
product_cards.title: font-['Inter'] text-[#2F2623] text-sm md:text-base truncate

badges.discount: absolute top-2 left-2 bg-[#C6A15B] text-[#2F2623] text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 z-10
badges.trust: flex flex-col items-center text-center p-4 bg-[#F7E7E9] gap-2 rounded-sm border border-[#EADDD4]

inputs.text: h-11 border border-[#EADDD4] bg-[#FFFFFF] px-3 font-['Inter'] text-[#2F2623] focus:border-[#9A4F5F] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#9A4F5F] outline-none w-full

components.floating_whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 md:bottom-8 md:right-8 w-14 h-14 bg-[#25D366] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg z-50 hover:scale-110 transition-transform

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle scale-up (1.05) on product images. Button background color darkening.
motion_and_interactions.gallery: Swipeable image gallery on Product Detail Page for mobile users.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: All state changes should use transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out.

instructions_to_main_agent: No customer login functionality. Checkout must be guest-only.
No online payment gateway integrations. Provide COD, bKash, and Nagad as static options (instructions/radio buttons).
Build the following pages: Homepage, Shop page, Category page, Product Detail page, Cart slider/page, Checkout, Order Confirmation, and Static pages.
Seed dummy product data using the styling guidelines.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Integrate lucide-react or similar for icons (search, cart, user, whatsapp, menu).
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing sections, Shadcn for complex forms/dialogs.
Ensure you use .js/.jsx extensions instead of .tsx since this is a JS-based project.

testing.attributes: All buttons, inputs, links, and forms MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='checkout-form-name'.

hero.description: Elegant woman wearing gold necklace (Hero option 1)
Elegant woman wearing silver necklace (Hero option 2)

products.description: Gold and silver ring on dark surface
Gold ring stack on white sheet
Woman ear close up adorned with earring
Stylish gold earring with red accents

placeholders.categories: Use cropped square portions of the product/hero images for category thumbnails.
